suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the `window.location.hash` navigation pattern for hash-based routing. When using hash-based routing (/#/route), prefer `window.location.hash = '#/path?query'` over TanStack Router's `Link` component with `search` params, as the latter doesn't reliably work with hash routing.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-simulator-links changed ExampleDetail from TanStack Link with search params to window.location.hash approach. The original approach was broken with hash-based routing.
